source_file: Altumint-TM001(02) Flashing Light Video Monitor Assembly Instructions-240326-194800.pdf

text_blocks.text: Attach DIN rail to middle right of plate using QTY four (4) 10-32 hex button head screws.
text_blocks.label: list_item

text_blocks.text: Attach circuit breakers to DIN rail. From left to right, the order is 6A -> 13A -> 2A
text_blocks.label: list_item

text_blocks.text: Mark the circuit breakers , from left to right, as PV --> BATT --> LOAD using a permanent marker.
text_blocks.label: list_item

figures.label: page_screenshot

full_text: Attach DIN rail to middle right of plate using QTY four (4) 10-32 hex button head screws. Attach circuit breakers to DIN rail. From left to right, the order is 6A -> 13A -> 2A Mark the circuit breakers , from left to right, as PV --> BATT --> LOAD using a permanent marker.
